changes.value:
## What

Group context menu items by depth and insert visual separators between groups.

### Files to modify
- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/context-menu.ts` — modify useContextMenu hook to group by depth, insert __separator__ sentinels
- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — handle __separator__ items in show_context_menu, exclude from context_menu_ids

### Changes
1. Frontend: Loop through contextCommands (CommandAtDepth objects), track lastDepth, insert {id: '__separator__', name: ''} between depth groups
2. Rust: Check item.id == '__separator__' in MenuBuilder loop, call builder.separator() instead of builder.text()
3. Exclude separator IDs from context_menu_ids set
4. Write tests for: separators inserted between depths, no separator for single depth, empty command list

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Items at different depths get separators between them
- [ ] Single-depth items produce no separators
- [ ] Separator IDs excluded from pending handlers and context_menu_ids
- [ ] All tests pass
Add separator support to context menus
